summary: Documenting llm-d related Metrics and example queries that customer can use to create their own dashboard (self hosted)
description:
h3. Problem Statement

Users who deploy *llm-d* (Large Language Model Deployment) lack a guide that explains the data points exported by the system. Without a clear list of these metrics and example queries, it is difficult for users to understand if their hardware is being used effectively or if the system is responding slowly.

*Solution*

Provide documentation of the specific names of data points exported by the llm-d (Large  and provide PromQL (Prometheus Query Language) examples.

The documentation should also explain how to create a ServiceMonitor (a configuration that tells the system where to find data) so that UWM (User Workload Monitoring) can see the llm-d (Large Language Model Deployment) metrics.

Metrics list

llm-d under Components tab

[https://docs.google.com/document/d/1jfRI6OH72bSL8besUoJ5yxPnrae2K2jpbnN-HNsiAdw/edit?usp=sharing]

 

PromQL examples

https://gist.github.com/sallyom/375d7bbfc33270c5791b0ac0430b6998
